prestazioni: Engine swap to a **426 Hemi (RB26H)** crate engine from **Dodge Performance Parts (P5153810)**, featuring forged internals, billet crankshaft, and CNC-ported heads with 2.25" intake/1.94" exhaust valves, paired with a **Holley Dominator EFI (PN: 556-112)** standalone ECU and **MSD Pro-Billet HEI Distributor (PN: 8360)** for precise ignition timing.

Forced induction via **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm, .96 A/R turbine housing)** with a **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate (PN: MVR-60)** and **Precision Turbo 46mm dual ball-bearing blow-off valve (PN: 7660-46)**. Intercooled with a **PWR North America bar-and-plate intercooler (4.5" core, 22" x 12" x 3.5")** and **DeatschWerks 300LPH fuel pump (PN: 9-300-1300)** feeding **ID1700x injectors (PN: 4170)** for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Tremec TKX 5-speed manual transmission (PN: TKX-5000)** with **McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (PN: 625-0012)** and **SFI-certified aluminum flywheel (PN: 9350)**. Rear end reinforced with a **Dana 60 9" conversion (PN: 60-9-4.10)** using **Strange Engineering S60 axles (35-spline, chrome-moly)** and **Detroit Locker differential (PN: 225SL20)** for drag strip launches.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny Pandem V3 widebody kit (PN: RB-DG4-001)** with custom **carbon fiber fenders (2.5" flares)** and **aluminum overfenders** to clear the **Forgiato Traffico wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x12 +35 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**.

Custom **shaker hood scoop** fabricated from **304 stainless steel** with a **carbon fiber overlay**, feeding the **Holley Hi-Ram intake manifold (PN: 300-222)**. Painted in **PPG Dodge Hemi Orange (Code: PX8)** with **3M Matte Black (1080) vinyl accents** and **custom Super Bee stripe decals (1/4" pinstriping by Vinyl Frog)**.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Rollcage Customs 8-point chromoly cage (SFI 25.1 certified)** and **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (PN: 00862NR)** mounted on **Corbeau GT II brackets (PN: 50102)**. Dash replaced with a **Racepak IQ3 digital dash (PN: 750-1110)** and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (PN: 0111001211)** on a **NRG Innovations quick-release hub (PN: NRG-200)**.
